_note: MERGE into your LapEE/node config. acme@1.0 pin is the published Arweave impl dataitem ID. The on/start hook MUST use path 'run' (not 'start' - collides with hb dispatch) and hook.result 'ignore' (or the handler return breaks the on/start chain). Requires a node with a REAL public IP / reachable inbound port - will NOT work behind CGNAT (Starlink, most mobile). Set your domain/identifiers/ports and DNS creds; never commit the api-key.
